title: (Bullish Signal) BHP, Moving Average Convergence Divergence Histogram turned positive on June 8, 2021
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This is a Bullish indicator signaling BHP's price could rise from here. Traders may explore going long the stock or buying call options. Tickeron's A.I. dvisor identified 51 similar cases where BHP's MACD histogram became positive, and 39 of them led to successful outcomes. Odds of Success: 76%. Current price $74.22 crossed the resistance line at $75.55 and is trading between $75.55 resistance and $70.16 support lines. Throughout the month of 05/06/21 - 06/08/21, the price experienced a -3% Downtrend. During the week of 06/01/21 - 06/08/21, the stock fell -0.38%.

https://preview.redd.it/eq07wv9hd9471.png?width=1523&format=png&auto=webp&s=a7ab11231dbbb7386e6a4fa9ecf240b3267bbd05

**Bullish Trend Analysis**

The Momentum Indicator moved above the 0 level on June 03, 2021. You may want to consider a long position or call options on BHP as a result. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 63 of 89 past instances where the momentum indicator moved above 0, the stock continued to climb. The odds of a continued upward trend are 71%.

BHP moved above its 50-day Moving Average on May 27, 2021 date and that indicates a change from a downward trend to an upward trend.

Following a +3.27% 3-day Advance, the price is estimated to grow further. Considering data from situations where BHP advanced for three days, in 244 of 347 cases, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 70%.

The Aroon Indicator entered an Uptrend today. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 205 of 295 cases where BHP Aroon's Indicator entered an Uptrend, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued Uptrend are 69%.
